headline: Is Williams Sonoma (WSM) Still Attractive After Recent Share Price Pullback
summary: If you are wondering whether Williams-Sonoma's current share price still reflects good value or if the easy gains are behind it, this article will walk through what the numbers are actually saying about the stock. The share price last closed at US$179.99, with returns of a 3.5% decline over 7 days, a 15.6% decline over 30 days, a 4.2% decline year to date, a 9.1% gain over 1 year, a very large gain over 3 years, and a 126.3% gain over 5 years, which may influence how the market is thinking...
